steps.description: The student detaches the lens from the DSLR.
The student attaches the lens to the DSLR.
The student detaches the cover of the lens from the DSLR.
The student attaches the cover of the lens to the DSLR.
The student turns on the DSLR.
The student turns off the DSLR.
The student exchanged the battery of the DSLR.
